key_events: Sam Bankman-Fried withdraws retrial motion. He believes he would not get a fair trial.
The DAT collapse: Pantera wants Satsuma to dump its bitcoin as shares crash 99%
FTX sold its Cursor stake for $200,000 in 2023. It would be worth $3 billion today
Andre Cronje’s Flying Tulip adds withdrawal circuit breaker as DeFi exploits mount
